title: Operate an automated mineral analysis system
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate an automated mineral analysis system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare automated analysis system for operation

pcs.text: Confirm equipment status, shift priorities, work flow issues and/or specific client requirements with supervisor and other operators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm equipment status, shift priorities, work flow issues and/or specific client requirements with supervisor and other operators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm equipment status, shift priorities, work flow issues and/or specific client requirements with supervisor and other operators.

pcs.text: Plan or adjust work flow to suit maintenance or servicing as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan or adjust work flow to suit maintenance or servicing as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan or adjust work flow to suit maintenance or servicing as required.

pcs.text: Review job requests to identify samples/batches, required operating parameters and any special instructions/analyses for each
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review job requests to identify samples/batches, required operating parameters and any special instructions/analyses for each?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review job requests to identify samples/batches, required operating parameters and any special instructions/analyses for each.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures associated with samples, reagents, analytical methods and operating robotic arms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures associated with samples, reagents, analytical methods and operating robotic arms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures associated with samples, reagents, analytical methods and operating robotic arms.

pcs.text: Perform routine system checks at start of shift
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform routine system checks at start of shift?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform routine system checks at start of shift.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare automated analysis system for operation

elements.title: Conduct or monitor loading of samples into system

pcs.text: For systems with a manual in-feed station, prepare vials with the specified sample volume and load them in the correct sequence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can For systems with a manual in-feed station, prepare vials with the specified sample volume and load them in the correct sequence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can For systems with a manual in-feed station, prepare vials with the specified sample volume and load them in the correct sequence.

pcs.text: For fully automated systems, monitor sample in-feed station to ensure vials contain specified minimum volumes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can For fully automated systems, monitor sample in-feed station to ensure vials contain specified minimum volumes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct or monitor loading of samples into system

elements.title: Monitor and adjust system operation

pcs.text: Adjust system operating parameters, such as furnace temperature, to suit specific batch requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust system operating parameters, such as furnace temperature, to suit specific batch requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust system operating parameters, such as furnace temperature, to suit specific batch requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor control screens continuously and respond promptly to error codes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor control screens continuously and respond promptly to error codes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor control screens continuously and respond promptly to error codes.

pcs.text: Conduct regular visual checks to ensure that system elements are operating correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct regular visual checks to ensure that system elements are operating correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct regular visual checks to ensure that system elements are operating correctly.

pcs.text: Interpret routine error codes to identify faulty system elements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret routine error codes to identify faulty system elements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret routine error codes to identify faulty system elements.

pcs.text: Take control of system and activate interlocks to isolate relevant system elements before investigating faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take control of system and activate interlocks to isolate relevant system elements before investigating faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take control of system and activate interlocks to isolate relevant system elements before investigating faults.

pcs.text: Clean and reposition robots, vials, crucibles or other system elements as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and reposition robots, vials, crucibles or other system elements as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and reposition robots, vials, crucibles or other system elements as necessary.

pcs.text: Use appropriate system checks and commands to reset system elements, re-enter sample data and resume operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate system checks and commands to reset system elements, re-enter sample data and resume operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate system checks and commands to reset system elements, re-enter sample data and resume operations.

pcs.text: Seek advice about dealing with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice about dealing with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice about dealing with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge.

pcs.text: Liaise with and assist relevant service personnel to ensure major breakdowns are rectified promptly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with and assist relevant service personnel to ensure major breakdowns are rectified promptly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with and assist relevant service personnel to ensure major breakdowns are rectified promptly.
